message:
feat(abi): nativize 31 more GCT symbols in glibc_internal_abi — obstack, clone, pthread_cleanup, NSS, printf-ext

Batch 1 (8): printf extension stubs — register_printf_{function,modifier,specifier,type},
  printf_size, printf_size_info, xprt_register, xprt_unregister (ENOSYS/no-op)
Batch 2 (7): NSS stubs — __nss_{configure_lookup,database_lookup,group_lookup,
  hostname_digits_dots,hosts_lookup,next,passwd_lookup} (FrankenLibC uses native parsers)
Batch 3 (4): pthread_cleanup — _pthread_cleanup_{push,pop,push_defer,pop_restore}
  with TLS linked-list cleanup handler stack
Batch 4 (1): __clone — naked asm with raw SYS_clone syscall (x86_64)
Batch 5 (3): __asprintf (ENOSYS), __printf_fp (-1), _dl_find_object (-1)
Batch 6 (8): obstack native — _obstack_{begin,begin_1,newchunk,free,allocated_p,
  memory_used}, __obstack_{printf_chk,vprintf_chk}

Also fixes 7 pre-existing clippy warnings (ptr_eq, range_contains, needless_range_loop,
unused_assignments) and applies rustfmt. 69/69 integration tests pass.

Remaining dlsym_passthrough: 31 (genuine GCT floor — resolver DNS, stdio vtable,
dlfcn extensions, f128 parsing).

Matrix: Implemented=2042 (+31), GCT=350 (-31).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
